Console_d_administration_au-dessus_de_li: Administration console on top of lib_UserManager and lib_FullSyncGrp to control FullSync accounts, groups, roles and permissions.
S_lectionnez_un_groupe_pour_voir_ses_mem: Select a group to see its members and roles.
S_lectionnez_un_utilisateur_pour_voir_se: Select a user to see their groups and effective permissions.
S_lectionnez_un_r_le_pour_voir_ses_permi: Select a role to see its permissions and the groups that use it.
S_lectionnez_une_permission_pour_voir_le: Select a permission to see the roles that use it.
Start_building_your_app: Start building your app from the Project tree.
Create_a_sequence_for_backend_logic: 2. Create a sequence for backend logic.
home_card_intro: Start building your app from the Project tree.
home_step_2: Create a sequence for backend logic.
